Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, of Pacific Justice Center, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiffs;
Brian R. Blackman, Blaxter Law, Tel. 415.500.7705, for defendants.

Ruling: The matter is discussed. PLAINTIFF AMY CHAMBERLIN'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment is approved. The Court finds that the Consent Judgment ensures compliance with the warning requirements, reimbursement of attorneys' fees is reasonable and civil penalty is reasonable. Order and Stipulated Consent Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Set For Trial On Aug-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn To Compel Attendance At Depo
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, Esq. of Pacific Justice, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiff and moving party;
Erin W. Keefe, Esq. of Blaxter Law, Tel. 415.500.7701, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF AMY CHAMBERLIN'S Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is DENIED. The defendant, Whole Foods Market, (WFM) agreed early on to present a person most knowledgeable and the date which all agreed to was February 27, 2014. In order to preserve its objections, WFM asserted numerous objections to the request for production at the deposition. WFM was not required to produce the documents before the deposition nor was WFM required to provide a list ahead of time identifying which documents it would or would not produce and which documents were privileged. To that extent, the motion is premature. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
